creator: karels@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Patrick M. Hausen from comment #19)
This driver has no idea whether it is on an RPi 3 or higher, or on an amd64.  Should every USB Ethernet driver check for RPi?

My DHCP server doesn't look up vendor info, but in this case, I would expect yours to find "FreeBSD Foundation" (the OUI used by ether_gen_addr).
